title: statusLine: expose the focused subagent's model/context when viewing an agent pane
summary: Draft upstream feature request asking Claude Code to add a focused_agent field to the statusLine payload so status reflects the focused subagent pane.
notes: Prose feature-request draft aimed at anthropics/claude-code. Contains a proposed JSON payload snippet but no acceptance criteria, user stories, or decision/consequences — no PRD/SPEC/ADR signals dominant. Classified as DOC (context). Includes an example payload schema which weakly hints SPEC, hence medium confidence.
